mapper.select: SELECT role_id, company_id, role_name, created_at FROM roles WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY role_id
SELECT role_id, company_id, role_name, created_at FROM roles WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND company_id = #{companyId}

SELECT p.permission_code, p.permission_tag, p.permission_name, c.default_describe AS tagLabel FROM permissions p LEFT JOIN common_code c ON p.permission_tag = c.common_id AND c.common_code = '0K' ORDER BY p.permission_tag, p.permission_code
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(role_id), 0) + 1 FROM roles
INSERT INTO roles (role_id, company_id, role_name) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{companyId}, #{roleName})
